mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_ui.guest_usage (user_id, used_count, quota_limit, login_count, login_limit) VALUES (#{userId}, 0, #{quotaLimit}, 0, #{loginLimit}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, used_count, quota_limit, login_count, login_limit, updated_at FROM agent_ui.guest_usage WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_ui.guest_usage SET used_count = used_count + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE agent_ui.guest_usage SET login_count = login_count + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE agent_ui.guest_usage SET used_count = 0, login_count = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
